params.name: Zizhi Tongjian
params.description:
On Aug 3, 959 AD, Sima Guang completed the compilation of the "Zizhi Tongjian."
"Zizhi Tongjian" is a work of Chinese history completed by the Northern Song historian Sima Guang over a period of 19 years. Its content spans nearly 300 volumes and covers 1,300 years of history from 16 different dynasties. Sima Guang drew on examples from the book to summarize a large amount of experience and lessons for future generations to reference. In this work, Sima Guang also integrated the characteristic …
